title: Entertaining Angels: The Dorothy Day Story
original_title: Entertaining Angels: The Dorothy Day Story
overview: The firebrand reporter, feminist and philanthropist Dorothy Day co-founds The Catholic Worker with Peter Maurin, an eccentric philosopher.
